roles.name: Loremaster
roles.description: Knower of ancient lore — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and watches over its integrity.

roles.name: Captain of the Guard
roles.description: Marshals the warriors of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to the Steward.

roles.name: Keeper of the Books
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets.

roles.name: Master Smith of Erebor
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features at the deep delvings.

roles.name: Steward of the West
roles.description: Captain over all Numenorean Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior smiths.

roles.name: Ranger of Ithilien
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft.

roles.name: Scout of the Northern Marches
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Ranger's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-Master of Khazad-dûm
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Bridge-builder of Khazad-dûm
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Master's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Bridge-builder
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the dwarvish patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Watcher of the Palantíri
roles.description: Master of the seeing-stones — observability, queueing, and the most senior integration challenges.

roles.name: Herald of the King
roles.description: Lifts the banner and the trumpet for product and message — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Trumpeter of the Citadel
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert.

roles.name: Banner-Bearer of Rohan
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride.

roles.name: Council Scribe of Rivendell
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the elvish craft of design.

roles.name: Healer of the Houses
roles.description: Tends the wounded and the weary — finds the maladies in the build before they reach the King.

roles.name: Weaver of the Mithril Threads
roles.description: Spins the fine, strong fabric of services, jobs, and the Node enchantments behind the Salesforce facade.
